mapper.sql: t.id, t.name, t.description, t.is_hot, t.is_builtin, t.created_at, COALESCE(usage_stats.app_count, 0) AS app_count
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tag_id, COUNT(1) AS app_count FROM app_tags GROUP BY tag_id ) usage_stats ON usage_stats.tag_id = t.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tags (name, description, is_hot, is_builtin, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{isHot}, #{isBuiltin}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tags t
WHERE t.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM tags t
WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.is_hot = #{isHot}
AND (t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY t.is_hot DESC, t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC
